<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("Player area:")
for r in range(28, 42):
    line = ascii_lines[r]
    if 'M' in line[10:20]:
        print(f"Row {r}: {line[10:20]}")

print("\nPath and blocks area:")
for r in range(30, 36):
    print(f"Row {r}: {ascii_lines[r][10:50]}")

# Check if any blocks changed
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['R', 'b', 'N']:
        print(f"Block: color={n['color']}, boundary={n['boundary'][:4]}...")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
